page.title: Settings
page.subtitle: Manage your restaurants and supplier mapping rules

edit_form.name: Name
edit_form.orgNumberHint: Only needed when this restaurant is its own legal entity (separate AB). Leave blank to inherit the parent organisation's number.

confirm.deleteOrDeactivate:
Delete or deactivate "{name}"?

Click OK to PERMANENTLY DELETE (cannot be undone)
Click Cancel to go back
confirm.deletePermanent:
Are you sure you want to permanently delete "{name}"?
All data for this restaurant will be lost.

supplier.title: Supplier Mapping
supplier.subtitle: Rules to automatically categorise supplier invoices when Fortnox syncs.
supplier.emptyRules: No rules yet. Add your first rule above.
supplier.footnote: Rules are applied in priority order. Higher priority = checked first.

digest.title: Weekly Digest Email
digest.subtitle: Every Monday at 07:00 you receive a summary of last week — revenue, costs, covers, and outstanding invoices for all your restaurants.
digest.send: Send test digest to my email

gdpr.title: Data & Privacy
gdpr.subtitle: Manage your data in accordance with GDPR. View our

ai.title: Store AI question text
ai.subtitle: When on, we save the first 100 characters of each AI question for quality debugging — retained 365 days, visible only to our support team. When off, we keep the model, token counts and cost (needed for billing) but the question text itself is never stored.

export.title: Export your data
export.subtitle: Download a complete copy of all data we hold for your organisation — restaurants, P&L, staff logs, forecasts and invoices — in JSON format.

delete.title: Delete your account
delete.subtitle: Request permanent deletion of all your data. This cannot be undone. We will process your request within 30 days and send a confirmation email. Note: billing records are retained for 7 years as required by Swedish law.
delete.confirmBody: This will permanently delete all restaurants, financial data, staff logs, forecasts and integration connections. This cannot be undone.

company.context: Required for VAT-compliant invoicing, sub-processor contracts, and Fortnox cross-verification.

headline.grace: Add your organisationsnummer ({days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}} remaining)

company.expiredFollowup: Some features will be blocked until you add your organisationsnummer below.
company.label: Organisationsnummer
company.hint: 10 digits — accepts the formatted version (XXXXXX-XXXX) or unformatted.
company.why1: Swedish VAT-compliant invoicing requires your org-nr on receipts.
company.why2: Sub-processor agreements (Supabase, Anthropic, Stripe, Resend) reference your legal entity.
company.why3: Disambiguates your company from similarly-named businesses across Sweden.
